notableEvents.label: Samuel Basallo reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Samuel Basallo reaches on a fielding error by pitcher Griffin Jax.

notableEvents.label: Blaze Alexander GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rays challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was overturned: Blaze Alexander grounds into a double play, shortstop Oliver Dunn to second baseman Richie Palacios to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Colton Cowser out at 2nd. Blaze Alexander out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Richie Palacios GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Richie Palacios grounds into a double play, pitcher Shane Baz to shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Yandy Díaz out at 2nd. Richie Palacios out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Samuel Basallo reaches on a fielding error by pitcher Griffin Jax.

notableEvents.label: Yandy Díaz GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Yandy Díaz grounds into a double play, shortstop Gunnar Henderson to second baseman Jackson Holliday to first baseman Pete Alonso. Jonathan Aranda out at 2nd. Yandy Díaz out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Vilade pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Vilade singles on a line drive to center fielder Leody Taveras.
